explanations.pt-br: Query engine criado com as_query_engine() — combina retriever + LLM para RAG.
explanations.en-us: Query engine created with as_query_engine() — combines retriever + LLM for RAG.

explanations.pt-br: query() executa a pergunta e retorna resposta gerada pelo LLM com contexto dos documentos.
explanations.en-us: query() executes the question and returns LLM-generated answer with document context.
